name: Tuscan Wood Fired Pizza
description: Live rustic smoked thin crust pizzas with a variety of toppings — Sun Kissed Tomatoes and Farmhouse Special

name: Live Pasta Station
description: Freshly prepared pasta — Penne Fusilli Spaghetti — with choice of Pesto Arrabiata or Alfredo sauce

name: Sushi Station
description: Live Japanese sushi preparation — Nigiri Maki and California Rolls with wasabi and pickled ginger

name: Dim Sum Station
description: Live steamed and pan-seared dumplings — vegetable and protein options with dipping sauces

name: Shawarma Station
description: Live carved shawarma served in pita bread with minted labneh and Moroccan pickled vegetables

name: Mexican Cuisine Station
description: Live tacos enchiladas quesadillas and nachos with guacamole salsa and sour cream

name: Live BBQ Grill
description: Assorted vegetables and proteins grilled live with herbs and spices served with sauerkraut

name: Schezwan Wok Station
description: Live stir-fry counter — choose your vegetables protein and sauce (Kungpao Mapo or Hotpot)

name: Crepe Station
description: Live thin French pancakes with selection of fillings and sauces — sweet or savoury

name: Italian Risotto Station
description: Live creamy risotto prepared with choice of seasonal accompaniments and Parmesan

name: Live Jalebi and Rabri Station
description: Live preparation of fermented flour coils fried in pure ghee soaked in saffron syrup served warm with thickened rabri

name: Chaat Counter
description: Live chaat station — paani poori dahi bhalla papdi chaat and aloo tikki served fresh

name: Tandoor Live Station
description: Live tandoor counter with fresh kebabs naans and rotis served piping hot

name: Dosa and Uttapam Station
description: South Indian live counter — masala dosa rava dosa and uttapam with chutneys and sambhar
